debug_info.goal:
case none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
r : ENNReal
f g : α → 𝕜
q : ENNReal
hr₀ : r ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple none q r
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[none] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q]

proof:
cases hpqr
    have hr_eq_q : r = q := by aesop
    subst hr_eq_q
    have h_pointwise : ∀ x, ‖(f * g) x‖ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g x‖ := by
      intro x
      have hfx : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] := by
        have := MeasureTheory.cLinftyNorm_eq_iSup_nnnorm f
        generalize_proofs at *
        exact_mod_cast this.symm ▸ le_ciSup (Finite.bddAbove_range fun i => ‖f i‖₊) x
      simpa only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul] using
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hfx (norm_nonneg _)
    have h_mono : ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(fun x => ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g x‖)‖ₙ_[r] := by
      apply_rules [MeasureTheory.cLpNorm_mono_real]
    convert h_mono using 1
    convert cLpNorm_const_smul (‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] : ℝ) (fun x => ‖g x‖) |>.symm using 1
    simp (config := { decide := true }) [← NNReal.coe_inj]
successful_attempts:
cases hpqr
    have hr_eq_q : r = q := by aesop
    subst hr_eq_q
    have h_pointwise : ∀ x, ‖(f * g) x‖ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g x‖ := by
      intro x
      have hfx : ‖f x‖ ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] := by
        have := MeasureTheory.cLinftyNorm_eq_iSup_nnnorm f
        generalize_proofs at *
        exact_mod_cast this.symm ▸ le_ciSup (Finite.bddAbove_range fun i => ‖f i‖₊) x
      simpa only [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul] using
        mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right hfx (norm_nonneg _)
    have h_mono : ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] ≤ ‖(fun x => ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g x‖)‖ₙ_[r] := by
      apply_rules [MeasureTheory.cLpNorm_mono_real]
    convert h_mono using 1
    convert cLpNorm_const_smul (‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] : ℝ) (fun x => ‖g x‖) |>.symm using 1
    simp (config := { decide := true }) [← NNReal.coe_inj]
